youtube_items.title: [YT] Global Economy Slowdown 2025-2026: Recession Wave Coming?
youtube_items.summary: The world economy stands at a precarious juncture, forecasts for 2025 and 2026 paint a picture of slowing growth. This is not a sudden storm but a culmination of pressures building for some time. Global GDP growth is decelerating, with the OECD projecting a decline from 3.2% in 2024 to 3.0% by 2026. This trend signals a period of economic cooling that could affect jobs, businesses and household incomes worldwide. Persistent inflation remains a major concern, eroding the purchasing power of consumers. Central banks have responded by raising interest rates to cool down demand and bring inflation under control. However, these higher interest rates also make borrowing more expensive, dampening investment and spending. Global public debt has reached unprecedented levels, creating vulnerabilitie
